name: construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate the submission process instead of manual submission of permits through various channels.
problem_solved: Delays in permit submissions lead to project hold-ups and increased costs.
